title: WID.world Top Income/Wealth Shares & Average National Income — Venezuela
source_org: World Inequality Lab / World Inequality Database (WID.world)
time_coverage: varies by country (WID coverage typically starts 1800-1900; see data)
units: income/wealth shares as fraction of total (0-1); anninc in local currency units per adult (see WID_Metadata csv for exact units/currency per row)
license_terms: WID.world data is open access (see https://wid.world/methodology/ and site terms)
notes: Retrieved via WID.world's underlying data API (https://rfap9nitz6.execute-api.eu-west-1.amazonaws.com/prod/countries-variables-dl), the same endpoint used by the interactive bulk-download tool at https://wid.world/data/ (client-side public API key extracted from the site's own app.js). Variables requested: top 10% and top 1% shares of pre-tax national income (sptinc) and net personal wealth (shweal), all available age/population variants (10 series requested: anninc_p0p100_992_i,anninc_p0p100_999_i,shweal_p90p100_992_j,shweal_p90p100_999_j,shweal_p99p100_992_j,shweal_p99p100_999_j,sptinc_p90p100_992_j,sptinc_p90p100_999_j,sptinc_p99p100_992_j,sptinc_p99p100_999_j), plus average national income per adult (anninc, p0p100, both age variants). DataQuality column in the CSV encodes WID's own data-quality/estimation-method flag per cell (0=best available observed/interpolated, higher codes indicate more extrapolation/modeling — see WID_Metadata csv and https://wid.world/methodology/ for the quality-code legend). Empty Value cells are genuine missing data (years/series WID has no estimate for), not fabricated. The full mega bulk file (wid_all_data.zip, ~842MB) was skipped per size-discipline rule (>500MB); this per-country extract covers the specific inequality metrics requested.
